notes: MegaChat fixed (model bumped to claude-sonnet-4-6, sidebar now appears live on API key save). New Sync Log tab in Log Viewer with structured Push/Pull/No-op events per action. Per-mod thematic icons on the Mods page (Hoe → shovel, Shot → crosshair, Fishing → fish, etc.). MegaBugs gains ticket priority (Urgent/Normal/Low) and a clickable ticket ID with copy-to-clipboard. UI lag on MegaBugs status changes/replies fixed — backend commands no longer block the UI thread; status and reply actions update optimistically and reconcile in the background.
